questions: How do I tell a good story?
answers: Storytelling is the craft of sharing a narrative to engage, entertain, or educate an audience. It can be written, spoken, or visual.
Storytelling holo golpo bolar kala — etar madhyomey tumi audience ke engage korte paro, shikkhate paro, ba entertain korte paro.
A good story has a clear beginning, middle, and end, with relatable characters, conflict, and an emotional payoff that keeps people hooked.
Storytelling is crucial in business, education, and daily life because humans naturally connect with narratives more than raw facts or data.
